ops.title: C3 judged-gate implementation contract: athome Judge/GoldenGate API + cc-steer promotion surfaces
ops.body:
# C3 judged-gate implementation contract

Recon digest (luna xhigh via codex, 2026-07-16, spot-verified against source by ccsteer-c0). Verified against athome 0.4.0 installed source and cc-steer at 51d6cf8b.

## CRITICAL FLAG — there is no proof file

`GoldenProof` (athome golden.py:180) is an in-memory dataclass "minted only by `prove_gate`" — it has NO serialization, and `write_packet()` (golden.py:339-344) writes exactly three files: `packet.md`, `labels_template.json`, `manifest.json`. The plan's "proof persisted at ~/.cc-steer/eval/golden/watcher-fires/" can only mean that triple (with labels filled). Each retrain run re-mints the proof in memory: `verify_packet(packet_md, manifest)` → `read_labels(path, manifest=...)` → `agreement(human, panel)` → `prove_gate(report=..., manifest=...)`. Do not look for or invent a GoldenProof file.

## athome.research.judge (judge.py)

- `Judge[T: BaseModel]` frozen dataclass: `verdict_model`, `backend: LlmBackend`, `tier: TModel = "large"`, `timeout=240`. `Judge.bind(verdict_model, *, backend, tier, timeout)`; `.family` (PROVIDER_FAMILIES), `.identity` (hashes verdict schema), `async .verdict(prompt, *, generator_family, grant: SpendGrant, label)`. `__post_init__` rejects unknown-provider backends. Built-in `Pairwise(BaseModel)` verdict: `winner: Literal["A","B","tie"]`.
- Spend grants: `PanelGrant(manifest)` (bootstrap), `ControlsGrant(golden, epoch)`, `SpendClearance(golden, controls, min_paraphrase_tie=0.5, min_garbage_loss=0.9)`. `type SpendGrant = PanelGrant | ControlsGrant | SpendClearance`.
- `JudgeRow(row_id, candidate, reference)` (judge.py:548-561). `VoteContext(prompt_version, digest)`. `VoteCache.open(path)` / `.get` / `.put` (full-JSON snapshot under async lock).
- Batch entry: `judge_candidates(judge, rows, *, generator_family, controls: Sequence[ControlPair], golden: GoldenProof, context, build_prompt: Callable[[str,str],str], seed, cache=None, concurrency=8) -> list[Vote]` (order-preserving). Enforced internal order: (1) `ensure_cross_family` → CrossFamilyViolation/UnknownFamilyError; (2) `golden.check()` inside `run_controls` → GoldenGateViolation; (3) fresh `HealthEpoch`, controls NEVER cached; (4) `SpendClearance.check()` → JudgeControlsViolation on n_paraphrase==0 / n_garbage==0 / garbage_loss_rate<0.9 / paraphrase_tie_rate<0.5; (5) per-row `pairwise_vote` → `Judge.verdict` → `run_verdict`, buy boundary rechecks cross-family + clearance before `spawnllm.extract`.
- Retry: `with_backoff` retries ONLY `spawnllm.BackendCallError`, 4 attempts, 5/10/20s, then `JudgeError`. Everything else propagates.
- Constants: MAX_ATTEMPTS=4, DEFAULT_CONCURRENCY=8, MIN_PARAPHRASE_TIE=0.5, MIN_GARBAGE_LOSS=0.9, VOTE_KEY_SCHEMA=2.

## athome.research.golden (golden.py)

- `build_packet(rows, *, strata, stratum_of, window_of, row_id, seed, dataset_digest, question, header) -> GoldenPacket`; `write_packet(packet, dir)`; `verify_packet(*, packet_md, manifest) -> VerifiedManifest`; `read_labels(path, *, manifest) -> dict[str,bool]`; `agreement(human, panel) -> AgreementReport`; `prove_gate(*, report, manifest) -> GoldenProof`.
- Default gate: `GoldenGate(n=len(sampled), floor=n//2+1)`. Manifest carries seed, dataset_digest, packet_sha256, rows_sha256, strata sizes, gate, row index. Labels must be exactly "yes"/"no".
- Violation triggers: packet hash mismatch (verify_packet); `AgreementReport.check()` raises in order on n!=gate.n → panel_constant → agree<floor; rows fingerprint mismatch (read_labels); GoldenSampleError when a stratum pool < size.

## cc-steer integration surfaces (verified at 51d6cf8b — NOTE: T3.1 is reshaping where candidate_arr/frame come from; re-verify line numbers after T3.1 lands)

- `Verdict(promote, reason)` (promotion.py:43-48). `GateResult` (promotion.py:50-84) already has `harmful_favors_incumbent: bool | None` and `promote: bool | None` (None while judging pending) — the schema anticipated C3.
- `corrected_gate(...)` (promotion.py:136-174): `incumbent_fires = incumbent_probs < incumbent_threshold`; `candidate_fires = matched_fire_mask(candidate_probs, budget_fires=incumbent_fires.sum())`; `warranted = corrective & prose`; wins = `candidate_fires & ~incumbent_fires & warranted`, losses = `incumbent_fires & ~candidate_fires & warranted`. NO first-class disagreement mask exists — judged.py builds JudgeRows from exactly these two inline boolean expressions. `promote = None if harmful_favors_incumbent is None else (free_pass and not harmful_favors_incumbent)`.
- No draft-helpfulness evaluation exists anywhere in corrected_gate today — fires are credited purely by threshold crossing; `corrective`/`prose` are pre-computed row categories. The helpful-coverage arm (note 115613d3: data-validity filter + judged-helpful credit, NOT a blanket non-empty rule) is net-new.
- Call site watcher.py:300-335: `harmful_favors_incumbent=None` hardcoded — C3's slot. `_gate_stats(result)` (watcher.py:480-489) → `promotion.journal()`.

## Sequencing

C3 implementation waits on T3.1 (eval-what-you-serve: gate evidence switches to served-artifact probs — fire masks then describe served behavior, which is what judging should consume). C3 routes to opus xhigh per the Workflow Plan; judge prompt text authored by fable. Golden packet built on the T1 clean frozen frame; refreezing the frame invalidates the packet (re-label). Judge spend: cross-family (non-Qwen) judges via spawnllm large=opus; VoteCache at ~/.cc-steer/eval/votes.json.
ops.when: When implementing or writing the brief for cc-steer C3 (the judged promotion gate, cc_steer/retrain/judged.py) or authoring its judge prompts / golden packet flow
